commit.message:
Mix editorial sections with relevant article cards inline

Each ## thematic section now renders as prose (left) + sidebar of the
articles cited in that section (right), giving a true newspaper layout
where related articles appear alongside the text that discusses them.
Uncited articles fall into a More Stories grid at the bottom.

- _parseSections(): splits LLM markdown by ## headings, extracts cited
  article indices per section
- _renderSectionProse(): renders prose with inline citation links
- _renderInlineCard(): compact sidebar article card
- _buildNpBody(): assembles section blocks, tracks rendered ids, appends
  uncited remainder as story grid
- Replaced above-fold/editorial-col/lead-story CSS with np-section-block /
  np-section-row / np-section-cards / np-inline-card layout
- Responsive: stacked on mobile, cards go horizontal row
- Print: section cards fixed width, prose 2-col on full-width sections

commit.message:
fix: standardize ECI handling to use ncf (non-point CFs) consistently

Both CVM and MCS now validate and use ncf ECIs instead of tc:
- CVM already used ncf from Stage 2 for validation
- MCS now also loads AllClusterData and validates eci.length == ncf
- CEC JSON files now store only ncf values (4 instead of 6)
- Removed point and empty cluster ECIs (constants, not optimization variables)

This eliminates the design inconsistency where CVM used 4 ECIs but
MCS accepted 6. Both now expect ncf-length ECI arrays.

Files changed:
- MCSCalculationContext: load AllClusterData, override getClusterTypeCount() to return ncf
- CalculationService: set AllClusterData on MCS context, use ncf for requiredECILength
- cec.json: store only 4 values (ncf) instead of 6 (tc)

commit.message:
Replace CSS opening animation with GSAP timeline to fix jitter

The overlapping CSS animations (parent card scaling + children translating)
caused sub-pixel rendering jitter. Replaced with a single GSAP timeline
that sequences all entrance animations in one RAF loop. Respects
prefers-reduced-motion by setting duration to 0.

commit.message:
Release v4.6.0: Conflict Resolution UX (Goal 28)

Stop silent confidence decay and surface conflict resolution to users.

## Added

- **Conflict persistence**: detectConflicts() results now accumulated to project
  metadata via persistNewConflicts() with deduplication. Removes silent decay
  of older memories when contradictions detected.

- **recall output_mode=conflicts**: New mode to inspect all unresolved
  contradictions between memories. Shows similarity, reason, NLI scores, and
  LLM explanations (if available).

- **memory action=resolve_conflict**: New action to resolve detected contradictions.
  Four strategies:
  - keep_newer: deprecate the older memory
  - keep_older: deprecate the newer memory
  - keep_both: acknowledge conflict, retain both
  - merge: consolidate via existing consolidate action

- **Briefing surface**: Full-tier session briefings now include
  unresolvedConflicts count when contradictions exist.

## Changed

- Removed applyConflictConfidenceDecay() calls from conflict detection path
  (function definition kept for future use). Users now have explicit control
  via resolve_conflict instead of automatic 20% decay on each recall.

## Tests

Added 16 tests covering:
- persistNewConflicts deduplication and accumulation
- recall conflicts output mode validation
- resolve_conflict validation (params, conflicts, strategies)
- detectConflicts no longer produces dirtyItems

Full test suite: 118 files, 2206 tests passed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix CSS cascade layers and tools filter dark mode

Wrap global base styles (body, headings) in @layer base and
component styles (layout, prose, transitions) in @layer components
so Tailwind utilities can properly override them via the cascade.
Previously, unlayered CSS always beat layered Tailwind utilities
regardless of specificity, causing dark mode text classes to fail.

Also fix the tools category filter JS to set complete className
strings with dark: variants instead of toggling individual classes
that lacked dark mode support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add LokiLogger - Erlang logger handler that pushes logs to Loki

Registers as an Erlang :logger handler, buffers log messages, and
flushes to Loki in batches via HTTP. No Promtail needed. Configurable
min_level, flush_interval, and max_buffer_size. Starts automatically
when loki_url is configured via the supervisor.

commit.message:
fix: Replace garbled UTF-8 characters in MCS sweep output display

Fixed character encoding issue in ResultsPanel.java where smart quotes and
mangled Unicode sequences (Î"E, Ïƒ) were rendering as garbled text in the
GUI sweep output. Replaced with clean ASCII labels:
- Î"E → dE (delta energy)
- Ïƒ(Î"E) → sd(dE) (standard deviation of delta energy)

Sweep display now shows clear, readable metrics.

commit.message:
docs: add Senior Supervisor buildout plan for 9+/10 production readiness

Comprehensive analysis covering:
- Market research (AI tutoring $1.63B→$7.99B by 2030)
- Reddit/community pain point analysis (Epic gamification, comprehension gaps)
- Competitor analysis (Epic, Raz-Kids, Khanmigo, Ello, Speakia)
- Child UX process design (8-step flow: Login→Books→Session→Review→Vocabulary)

commit.message:
feat: KsetraJna — meta-observer of the agent's field (BG 13.1-2)

The Ksetra-jna ("field knower") observes the entire antahkarana:
vedana, chitta, gandha, buddhi, cetana — producing frozen
BubbleSnapshots for self-observation and peer sharing.

- BubbleSnapshot: compressed frozen state (health, phase, action, tier, pattern)
- Drift detection: weighted diff between consecutive snapshots
- Stuck detection: avg drift below threshold over sliding window
- Trend analysis: improving/degrading/stable from health slope
- Digest: one-line peer-readable summary
- Fix: broken self.heartbeat.get_summary() → self._ksetrajna.stats()
- Buddhi: expose last_action, last_tier, last_pattern properties
- 20 new tests (unit + integration), 899 total pass

Foundation for BuddyBubble peer observation in agent-city.
Snapshot → MahaCell encoding is the next step.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: task-aware model routing — best model per task type automatically

Smart routing based on task type + provider availability:
- Coding → Kimi K2.5 (Moonshot, SOTA coding)
- Research → Perplexity Sonar Pro (built-in web search)
- Content → Claude Sonnet 4.5 (best writing)
- Analysis → GPT-4.1 (strong reasoning)
- Chat → Groq Llama 3.3 (fastest, free)
- Simple → Groq/Nano (cheapest available)

Falls back to next best provider if primary is unavailable.
Updated cost-policy tiers with Moonshot + Perplexity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: MCS energy calculation optimization + correctness fix

- Add EmbeddingData.multiSiteEmbedCountsPerType() to precompute per-type
  multi-site embedding counts (topology-invariant, computed once)
- Update MCSampler to accept precomputed counts; eliminate per-call
  heap allocations and recounting (saves O(E_multisite) per averaging sweep)
- Pre-allocate cfNumScratch[] instead of allocating double[] per call
- Remove redundant hmixCoeff field from MCEngine; use sampler.meanHmixPerSite()
  directly in buildResult() (already computed during sampling)
- Guard temporary config mutation in LocalEnergyCalc.deltaEExchange() with
  try/finally to ensure restoration on exception (prevents silent corruption)

No functional change to MC physics. MCS energy formulas verified
CVM-equivalent (audit in c0d1bd0): ΔE, Hmix, Cv all mathematically correct.

- New: tools/deploy/upsert_protocol_overlays.py — Dataverse seed upsert script

Phase 2B — 5 Shared Protocol KBs:
- New: release/v8.0/shared/kb/SHARED_KB_API_Integration_v8.0.txt
- New: release/v8.0/shared/kb/SHARED_KB_Data_Access_v9.0.txt

fix: multi-agent security, AI engine, accessibility, and performance improvements

Security (Stream 1):
- [C-01] auth.js: fix IDOR on /child-select — add authMiddleware + parent_id ownership check
- [C-02] config.js: remove JWT_SECRET hardcoded fallback — exit(1) in production
- [H-01] app.js: CORS whitelist via ALLOWED_ORIGINS env + add CSP/HSTS/Permissions-Policy headers
- [H-06] sessions.js: eliminate N+1 queries with Promise.all parallelization
- [H-07] sessions.js: fix vocabulary COUNT to session-scoped words only
- [H-04][L-02] sanitize.js: add authRateLimiter (10 req/min) + recursive object sanitization

AI Engine (Stream 2):
- [C-04] prompts.js: add CONTENT SAFETY section + turn-based Body sub-questions
- [H-08] engine.js: guard against null studentMessage sent to Claude API
- [H-09] stageQuestions.js: normalize stage keys to lowercase (Title→title etc.)
- [H-09] sessions.js: fix turn counting to count only student messages per stage
- [H-05] page.js: integrate real parentLogin API replacing mock login

Accessibility (Stream 3):
- [A-01] VoiceButton: add aria-label, aria-pressed, aria-hidden on SVG, disabled prop
- [A-02] globals.css: add :focus-visible ring + .sr-only utility class (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- [A-03] layout.js: add aria-hidden="true" to all nav emoji elements
- [A-04] session/page.js: role=status/alert, useCallback memoization, child-friendly messages
- [A-05] vocabulary/page.js: keyboard-accessible flip cards + remove alert()

Performance (Stream 3):
- [P-01] books/page.js: replace useEffect filter with useMemo
- [P-02] useSpeech.js: voice list caching, Audio ref tracking, onerror isListening fix

Docs: add AGENT_REPORT.md with full analysis results (15 fixes, score 5.8→7.6/10)

commit.message:
refactor: kill duck-typing — NormalizedResponse + ProviderProtocol

All LLM adapters (Google, Mistral, Anthropic) now normalize vendor
responses at their boundary into a single NormalizedResponse type.
Downstream code uses typed field access instead of hasattr/getattr
chains. ~30 hasattr/getattr calls eliminated across engine, chamber,
summarizer, agent, services, and api.

- Add NormalizedResponse, StreamDelta, StreamingProvider, ChamberProvider
- Rewrite adapters to return NormalizedResponse at boundary
- Collapse _extract_tool_calls from 25 lines to 5
- Delete _AdapterResponse, _StreamedResponse, _BuiltToolCall, _StreamDelta
- Replace FakeToolCall/FakeFunction with ToolUse across 7 test files
- 879 tests pass, -286 lines net

commit.message:
Fix auto-distillation duplication: prevent re-promotion and dedup appends

Two bugs caused behavioral-prefs.md to accumulate hundreds of duplicate
entries: upsert_correction flipped promoted entries back to pending_promotion
on each new detection, and the distillation step appended without checking
if the theme already existed in the file.

Swedish language learning CLI with Bubble Tea

Terminal app for practicing Swedish (A1-A2 level) with three game modes:
vocabulary translation, typing practice, and sentence translation.
Includes 27 word categories, 4 sentence levels, persistent stats,
and AI help via Claude/OpenAI APIs.
